backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining data types (AnalysisResult, UserProfile, UserSettings, Timeframe) and endpoints for storing/retrieving analyses, user profiles, and settings, with role-based access control via AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs for localStorage key unification, Settings timeframe selector fixes, countdown timer fixes, and related UI/backend improvements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every page, component, hook, and service in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Advance Signal Pro' that mounts the React app at the `#root` div and loads the module entry point `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Dashboard, AnalyzeChart, ProcessingScreen, Results (`/results/$id`), History, and Settings, wrapped in ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/CameraCapture.ts: Camera capture component using the `useCamera` hook with fully Portuguese UI labels for start, capture, retake, and stop actions, plus translated error messages for permission, not-found, and not-supported states.
frontend/src/components/ChartOverlay.tsx: A React canvas component that renders a chart image with overlaid support/resistance lines (dashed green/red) and a directional arrow indicating buy or sell signals.
frontend/src/components/FileUpload.tsx: A drag-and-drop/click/paste file upload component for images that validates file size (max 10MB) and calls a callback with the selected file.
A list item component displaying a past analysis entry with its signal direction, confidence percentage, timestamp, and WIN/LOSS badge.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps page content via a router Outlet, includes a Toaster for notifications, and renders a footer with branding.
A UI component showing a single processing step with an animated progress bar, completion checkmark, and percentage display based on active/complete state.
frontend/src/components/SettingRow.tsx: A simple layout component that renders a labeled setting row with a description on the left and an arbitrary control element on the right.
frontend/src/components/SignalCard.tsx: A card component displaying a trading signal (COMPRA/VENDA/NEUTRO/SEM ENTRADA) with confidence percentage, trend direction badge, and optional strength indicator.
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts: Empty configuration file, likely a placeholder for API configuration settings.
frontend/src/context/ThemeContext.tsx: A React context provider that manages light/dark theme state, persists it to localStorage, and applies the theme class to the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: React hook that listens for paste events and extracts image files from the clipboard, returning the captured image and any permission errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useCountdownTimer.ts: React hook that counts down from a given number of seconds, returning the formatted time remaining, a finished flag, and raw seconds left.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including analyses, user settings, and daily operation progress via the canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSettings.ts: Thin wrapper around useGetSettings and useUpdateSettings that exposes settings data, loading state, and an updateSettings function.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind, defines light/dark CSS custom properties, and adds styles for processing bars, range inputs, and touch targets.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyzeChart.tsx: Page component that lets users select a chart image via file upload, camera, or clipboard, then stores it in sessionStorage and navigates to the processing page.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying the app branding, AI status badge, and navigation buttons to analyze charts, view history, and access settings.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: Displays a paginated list of past chart analyses fetched via `useGetAnalyses`, showing a loading spinner, empty state with a CTA, or a list of `HistoryListItem` components.
frontend/src/pages/ProcessingScreen.tsx: Orchestrates a 4-stage animated processing flow that loads a chart image from sessionStorage, runs local candle analysis, and navigates to the results page; handles chart detection errors and retries.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Renders the analysis result (signal, confidence, patterns, countdown timer) retrieved from sessionStorage and allows the user to record a WIN/LOSS feedback via `useUpdateOperationFollowed`.
frontend/src/pages/Settings.tsx: Settings page that lets users configure default timeframe, AI sensitivity, daily operation limit, and notifications, persisting values to both localStorage and the backend canister.
frontend/src/services/analysisApi.ts: Empty file with no exported content.
frontend/src/services/localCandleAnalysi: Client-side chart analysis engine that processes an uploaded image via pixel scanning to detect bullish/bearish candle columns, support/resistance levels, and candlestick patterns, returning a `LocalAnalysisResult`.
frontend/src/types/analysisTypes.ts: TypeScript interface defining the `LocalAnalysisResult` shape returned by the local candle analysis engine, including signal, trend, confidence, patterns, probabilities, and timeframe.
frontend/src/types/apiTypes.ts: TypeScript interfaces for the external chart analysis API response (`ApiAnalysisResponse`) and error (`ApiError`), with detailed JSDoc describing the mandatory 6-step rule-based analysis process the API must follow.
frontend/src/utils/dataUrlToFile.ts: Converts a base64 data URL string into a File object, returning null for any invalid, malformed, or non-base64 input without throwing errors.
frontend/src/utils/formatTimestamp.ts: Converts a nanosecond bigint timestamp to a human-readable Portuguese date/time string (e.g., '5 de Jan de 2024 às 14:30').
frontend/src/utils/mapApiResponse.ts: Defines the serialisable AnalysisResult interface and maps a LocalAnalysisResult object to it for storage in sessionStorage and use on the Results page.
frontend/src/utils/shareAnalysis.ts: Shares a formatted Portuguese analysis summary via the Web Share API, falling back to clipboard copy or a textarea execCommand for older browsers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended spacing/shadow/radius values, accordion keyframes, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 61) for Advance Signal Pro, documenting architecture, existing features, and known bugs such as analysis errors, save failures, and timeframe selector issues.
